goal_text: Task 07413: You want to find an expensive restaurant and it should serve thai food. Don't go for the first venue the system offers you, ask if there is anything else. Make sure you get the address and postcode of the venue.Remember. You don't want booking for restaurant. Just get the information and it all done.
